message:
fix(policy,predictive): add missing reason field and fix boundary condition

- policy.rs: add missing `reason: String::new()` field to GuardDiagnostics
  in regression test (struct field was added elsewhere)
- predictive.rs: change < to <= in action_horizon_minutes comparison so
  predictions exactly at the horizon boundary also trigger the
  free-space sanity gate

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
